libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No environment variables or system properties are required. If adapting the existing 2.4.0 tests for 2.4.1, update calls to org.eclipse.sisu.space.QualifiedTypeBinder.hear to the current two-argument signature hear(Class, Object) rather than the older three-argument form.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8602 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.sonatype.sisu:sisu-inject-bean:2.4.1; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The artifact is a deprecated legacy wrapper over Eclipse Sisu APIs, so generated tests should prefer public wrapper APIs and current method signatures.
The POM declares optional SLF4J, OSGi, JUnit, and TestNG integrations; do not add those dependencies unless tests deliberately target those optional integration paths.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra setup is needed: sisu-inject-bean 2.4.1 resolves its core Guice, CDI, and Eclipse Sisu dependencies transitively, and meaningful coverage is reachable with ordinary generated JUnit tests exercising bean scanning, URLClassSpace, SisuGuice, and binder behavior.
